PRICING

PRICING

PRICING

💰 Pricing & Engagement

Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.

We believe in fixed-price contracts and upfront honesty. You will always know exactly what your software will cost before we write a single line of code.

Project Baselines

Every project is unique, but here is what you can generally expect based on scope and complexity.

Startups & MSMEs

₹1.5L - ₹3L

Perfect for MVPs, rapid prototyping, and digitizing core business workflows.

  • ✓ Minimum Viable Products (MVPs)
  • ✓ Single-platform mobile apps
  • ✓ Custom CRM / Internal tools
  • ✓ Standard web applications
  • ✓ Fixed-price contract
Most Popular

SMB & Growth

₹3L - ₹5L

For scaling businesses requiring multi-platform solutions and system integrations.

  • ✓ Cross-platform mobile apps (iOS + Android)
  • ✓ Complex e-commerce platforms
  • ✓ AI integration & automation
  • ✓ Legacy system modernization
  • ✓ Milestone-based payments

Enterprise

₹5L+

Custom engineering for high-compliance, high-volume, or highly complex requirements.

  • ✓ Enterprise resource planning (ERP)
  • ✓ HIPAA / PCI compliant systems
  • ✓ Custom AI/LLM deployment
  • ✓ Dedicated engineering pods
  • ✓ Custom engagement models

How We Work With You

🎯

Fixed-Price (Project Based)

The safest way to build software. We define the exact scope, deliverable, and timeline upfront. We charge a fixed price with an advance payment to commence work. Larger projects are broken into clear, outcome-based payment milestones.

Best for: Projects with a clearly defined scope and strict budgets.
👥

Dedicated Team (Retainer)

Hire our engineers, designers, or product managers on a monthly retainer. You get flexible capacity without the overhead of full-time hiring, allowing you to pivot priorities sprint-by-sprint.

Best for: Ongoing product development, maintenance, and evolving scopes.

Common Questions

Why do you require an advance payment?

An advance payment confirms your commitment and funds the initial intensive architecture, design, and environment setup required to kick off a project successfully. It protects both parties and ensures we can allocate our best resources immediately.

What happens if the scope changes mid-project?

Under a fixed-price contract, any changes to the agreed scope are quoted as separate change requests. If you anticipate frequent changes, our Dedicated Team retainer model is usually a better fit.

Do you offer post-launch maintenance?

Yes. We typically quote an annual maintenance contract at 20% of the initial project cost, which covers OS/platform updates, security patches, and minor bug fixes.

Who owns the code?

You do. Upon final payment, we explicitly assign full IP and copyright of the source code to you. There are no hidden licensing fees or ransom clauses.

Ready to scope your project?

Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll discuss your requirements and give you a preliminary cost estimate on the call.
